\newcommand{\maketitlepage}{%

  \textbf{\ifdefined\thesisauthor\thesisauthor\else Author Name\fi}

\vspace{0.5cm}

  \textbf{\thesissubtitle}

\vspace{1.5cm}

  \textbf{\thesistype}

\vspace{0.5cm}

  \thesisaffiliation

\vspace{1.5cm}
